action.reasoning: Observation: New best rmse_z500 = 431.68 (ensemble of iter_14 best + iter_8 best). Analysis: Ensemble averaging reduces variance; adding more diverse checkpoints (same architecture, in_channels=8) may further improve the metric. All available epochs from iter_14 and iter_8 exist, as well as iter_12 best (fine-tuned from iter_8). Including them has minimal risk and can only lower the best score (the evaluation always tracks the best). Decision: Update predict.py to ensemble 6 models: iter_14 best, iter_14 epoch3, iter_14 epoch4, iter_8 best, iter_8 epoch5, iter_12 best. Submit eval to see if score improves. If so, we may finalize or add more members. Time remaining 0.33h allows this quick eval.
